title: With A Book
content:
Words shouting, singing, smiling, frowning
Sense lacking.
Ah, nothing, more obscure than Browning,
Save blacking.
meaning:
Ambrose Bierce's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "With A Book"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
